comments.author: @RawLifeDocumentary.EN26
comments.text: Skiing in the morning and floating in the desert by sunset? That’s not a country, that’s a real-life open-world video game!

comments.author: @DiscoverGlobePlacesTop10_NL158
comments.text: A country smaller than New Jersey... but changing the world in technology.Size really doesn't matter, does it ?

replies.author: @TheGlobalTruth04
replies.text: Absolutely! Innovation isn't determined by size—vision, creativity, and determination can have a global impact. 🚀

comments.author: @KevinHowell-n5v
comments.text: Israel is fantastic! I felt the presence of the Lord everywhere I went, especially in the Golan  heights.  Whatever it costs to see it, it is well worth it at least once in your life! Shalome!

replies.author: @TheGlobalTruth04
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your experience! We're glad your journey was so meaningful. Israel has many places of deep historical, cultural, and spiritual significance. Wishing you many more memorable travels. Shalom!
